title: Kanishka Narayan becomes the UK’s first cabinet-level AI minister
summary: Kanishka Narayan has become the first UK minister for artificial intelligence to sit at the cabinet table, a promotion that arrives as new prime minister Andy Burnham reshapes Whitehall around the technology.
